evals.name: replace-magic-sleep
evals.prompt: This Django Selenium test only passes with time.sleep(2). Help me rewrite it with a proper wait helper.
evals.expected_output: Diagnoses the observable condition, replaces sleep with explicit wait, keeps user-level intent, and suggests focused verification.

evals.name: page-pattern-refactor
evals.prompt: Our functional tests repeat login and item creation selectors everywhere. Refactor the approach using a page pattern without hiding behavior.
evals.expected_output: Introduces behavior-named helpers/page methods, keeps page objects thin, preserves isolation, and avoids duplicating full user journeys.
